title: Design System: Máy Ảnh Việt Nam

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Brand CTA in teal — 'Thêm vào giỏ', navigation highlights.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #00d4aa; color: #0a0a0f; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #00b894; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4aa; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Sale Button
components.description: Commerce urgency CTA in orange — 'Mua ngay', flash sale actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-sale { background: #ff6b35; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-sale:hover { background: #e85d2a; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-sale:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff6b35; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Search and form input on dark background.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #0a0a0f; color: #f0f0f5; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #2a2a38; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14px; min-height: 44px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #55556a; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(0,212,170,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,212,170,0.25); }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Product card with image, badges, price, rating. Lifts on hover.
components.html:
CANON

Canon EOS R50

12.990.000₫
components.css: .ds-card { background: #16161f; border: 1px solid #1e1e2a; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: rgba(0,212,170,0.4); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-card-img { aspect-ratio: 1/1; background: #0d0d14; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-img img { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-brand { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #00d4aa; } .ds-card-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #f0f0f5; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-card-price { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; color: #ffffff; margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Flash Sale Card
components.description: Sale product card with orange border glow and progress bar.
components.html:
15.990.000₫

Đã bán 60%
components.css: .ds-card-sale { background: #16161f; border: 1px solid rgba(255,107,53,0.3); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,107,53,0.1); } .ds-card-sale .ds-card-sale-price { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; color: #ff6b35; } .ds-card-progress { height: 6px; background: rgba(255,107,53,0.2); border-radius: 3px; margin-top: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff6b35, #ff4444); border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card-sold { font-size: 10px; color: #8888a0; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Category Nav Link
components.description: Category navigation item with emoji icon. Horizontal scroll on mobile.
components.css: .ds-nav-cat { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #8888a0; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-nav-cat:hover { color: #00d4aa; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); } .ds-nav-cat:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4aa; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: A cinematic digital showroom where the product is lit perfectly against a dark background. Confident, Technical, Cinematic — expert voice, data-forward layouts, smooth exponential motion. Deliberately rejects FPTShop/Shopee clutter and AI-generated cream monoculture.
keyCharacteristics: Rich black canvas, not cream or navy
One accent color (teal) used sparingly; rarity is the point
JetBrains Mono for prices and specs — technical credibility
Smooth exponential easing only; no bounce, no elastic
Vietnamese-first: VND currency, local payments, Vietnamese copy

rules.name: The Teal Restraint Rule
rules.body: Showroom Teal appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its power is in scarcity.

rules.name: The Surface Ramp Rule
rules.body: Every background step is the same hue (260°) at increasing lightness. Never mix warm-tinted surfaces.

rules.name: The Mono Prices Rule
rules.body: All prices are JetBrains Mono 700 with tabular-nums. Non-negotiable visual signature.

rules.name: The No-Gradient-Text Rule
rules.body: Text is never colored with a gradient background-clip. It's an AI-slop tell.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only on hover, focus, or active state.

dos: Do use JetBrains Mono for all prices, specs, order numbers, countdown digits
Do use flat-by-default: no shadow at rest, shadows only on hover/focus
Do keep teal accent ≤10% of any viewport
Do use exponential easing (ease-out-quart/quint/expo) for all motion
Do keep body text at Text Secondary (#8888a0) minimum
Do render Vietnamese currency as XX.XXX.XXX₫ with dot separators
Do use semantic HTML: header, nav, main, footer, article, section
Do make every interactive element keyboard-focusable with teal focus ring
Do keep touch targets ≥ 48×48px on mobile
donts: Don't use FPTShop/Shopee patterns: red-heavy, cluttered, flash-sale spam
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — AI-slop tell
Don't use bounce or elastic easing — exponential only
Don't apply glassmorphism decoratively — reserved for sticky header only
Don't use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as scaffolding
Don't put tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section
Don't use Text Muted (#55556a) for body copy — fails 4.5:1 contrast
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, margin, padding)
Don't use border-left > 1px as colored accent stripe
